title: VOOMEY Mini Paint Roller Covers，High Density Foam Paint Roller，4 Inch Foam Roller Paint, 24 Pack,Fits All Flat Surfaces, Including Kitchen Cabinets, Doors, Tables, Etc.
features: This set includes 24 4-inch round-head high-density foam roller covers that can be easily replaced, enabling you to efficiently complete your projects

A 4-inch high-density round-head foam paint roller that is lightweight and works perfectly with most water-based paints. The foam is strongly connected to the inner tube, and it is compatible with roller frames, allowing for flexible rolling
When dealing with small spaces, a 4-inch foam paint roller cover can easily fit in and evenly absorb and distribute the paint, resulting in a smooth surface
The 4 " mini rollers for painting can be used with standard 4-inch roller frames and are suitable for all surfaces, including kitchen cabinets, doors, tables, etc

If you encounter any issues with the quality or otherwise, please get in touch with us, and we will attend to your concerns as soon as possible. We will make every effort to assist you in resolving the problem. Thank you for your understanding and support
